case_title: WEBB, WILFRED VS MORENO, PATRICIA DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WEBB, WILFRED AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, PATRICIA DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL BRIGNOLE, JORGE CASTRO WILLIAM DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL & TOURS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO RM 208 AND IN TURN BROUGHT TO SMALL CLAIMS. PER PARTY, IT WAS MAILED TO THE WRONG ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB, WILFRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, PATRICIA DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27549 ON 6/24/04 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
